## Source: ghsa-malware (46fe072b4a859b2cba8c1cb74917ba23ccca50e61f582ee75cb8e78383f827f1)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (007d07edb120233aab0539e4646e8b634d2a95e2df9e6179bb9b2b6eb90f5a97)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'pg_result_init' @ 2.0.9 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

It is considered malicious because:
